title: tripleurospermum fissurale
intro: Tripleurospermum fissurale, also known as the sea mayweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Tripleurospermum fissurale lie in its essential oil, which contains compounds like camphor, pinene, and limonene, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in treating digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Tripleurospermum fissurale can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
